info.label: Software Developer
info.brief: Software developer with 5+ years of experience developing AWS-native applications and progressively leading technical teams. Specialized in serverless architectures and distributed systems, with deep expertise in SDK development and service migration. Native of Porto, Portugal, passionate about computer games, cycling, traveling and technological innovation.
info.quote: Two steps back, one step forward.

employment.summary: 5+ years of experience in cloud-native development, progressing from software development to technical leadership roles.

highlights: Techical Lead of the Asset Management platform using AWS serverless technologies, processing and enriching data for thousands EV chargepoints
Drive technical direction for the Asset Management API while ensuring Shell's enterprise security standards
Contribute to cross-team TypeScript and AWS service pattern initiatives, aligning with Shell's Recharge cloud governance framework
Performed migration of CI/CD pipelines from GitLab to GitHub, being compliant to Shell guidelines
Establish comprehensive monitoring using Datadog and CloudWatch, maintaining 99.9% service uptime
Mentor team members in AWS serverless architecture and compliance-first development

history.summary: Backend developer for Business API Team
highlights: Developed highly available serverless applications processing thousands of monthly requests
Implemented complex service migrations to meet Shell's enterprise requirements
Designed error handling and retry mechanisms using AWS SQS and EventBridge
Created automated compliance checking and security scanning in CI/CD pipelines
Optimized AWS Lambda utilization, reducing operational costs
Developed and documented post-mortems during the migration to Shell and shared with the Backend Guild as lessons learned

history.summary: Developer for core multi-tenant KYC/KYB platform
highlights: Developed multi-tenant serverless platform using AWS Lambda and DynamoDB
Implemented migration from Serverless Framework to AWS CDK v2
Built dynamic configuration system using AWS Parameter Store and Secrets Manager
Implemented comprehensive observability using AWS CloudWatch and X-Ray
Implemented KYC processes, for Germany and Netherlands, from third-party vendors.

history.summary: Developer for Ostate architectural parametric generation platform
highlights: Developed scalable compute pipeline using AWS EC2 and Docker
Implemented high-performance C++ fluid simulation algorithms with Python bindings for ease of use
Re-architected Ostate project to allow better code scalability and allow non deterministic algorithms

history.summary: Developer on Web team modernization efforts
highlights: Developed features for Uniface Web SDK implementing modern web standards
Implemented end-to-end functionality across low-code platform and C++ backend
Created cross-platform compatibility features for consistent system behavior
Developed an d maintained a 30 year old C++ 98 codebase
Developed documentation for new features and APIs
Contributed to the migration of MES from Silverlight to Angular/.NET Core
Development of a high precision module for regulated industries (medical)
Worked on the core team for the next-gen MES product
Developed components for .NET SDK integrating with Worldline Terminals
Implemented multi-threaded event handling system
Built network communication layers supporting multiple protocols
Created error handling systems for payment processing
Contributed to SDK documentation

education.summary: Bachelor's degree in Informatics Engineering with honors

history.institution: Instituto Superior de Engenharia do Porto
history.title: BSc Informatics Engineering
